PRODUCT_DESC: Advanced thermal solutions customized for your application needs.
PRODUCT_DESC_1: Provides high thermal conductivity and rapid heat spreading for high-power chips, ensuring fast heat dissipation and reduced thermal resistance.
PRODUCT_DESC_2: Delivers efficient heat transport with flexible routing options, suitable for diverse device cooling needs and improving overall thermal performance.
PRODUCT_DESC_3: Compact and efficient thermal modules designed to ensure stable operation of network equipment.
PRODUCT_DESC_4: High-performance liquid-cooling systems engineered for servers and high-performance computing, meeting stringent thermal requirements and ensuring long-term stability.
ADVANTAGE_DESC_1: Provides pressure-drop and performance simulations that integrate mechanical, flow-channel, and thermal design, accelerating customer design-verification cycles.
ADVANTAGE_DESC_2: Engineered with complex internal flow channels to enhance turbulence and satisfy pressure-drop requirements.
ADVANTAGE_DESC_3: Industry-unique multi-piece modular design significantly improves yield and manufacturing efficiency.
ADVANTAGE_DESC_4: Utilizes MSVE technology to achieve metal atomic diffusion bonding, enhancing product reliability and yield.
PRODUCT_COST_1: Thickness: 0.3 mm–10 mm  |  Power: 3 W–1200 W+. Supports single/multi-heat sources, high heat flux, and special structures.
PRODUCT_COST_2: Applications: AI servers, switches, 1.6T optical modules, notebooks, industrial computing.
PRODUCT_PIPE_1: Ø1 mm ultra-thin heat pipe | Ø1–Ø8 mm | Wick types: Sintered / Groove / Composite
PRODUCT_PIPE_2: Applications: Wearable devices, notebooks, switches, telecom equipment.
PRODUCT_THERMAL_1: VC modules, heat-pipe modules, aluminum extrusion / fin / copper base designs, reflow soldering, press-fit, adhesive bonding, coating.
PRODUCT_THERMAL_2: Applications: Notebooks, industrial PCs, servers, compact AI devices.
PRODUCT_WATER_1: Materials: Copper / Aluminum / Stainless Steel. Features: High-flow, low-pressure-drop design.
PRODUCT_WATER_2: Applications: AI GPUs, servers, semiconductor equipment.
PRODUCT_WATER_DESC_4: High-performance liquid-cooling systems designed for stable data-center thermal management. With precise flow-channel engineering and simulation-driven optimization, the system maintains low temperatures under heavy workloads and supports heat sources exceeding 1000 W, extending equipment lifespan and performance.
PRODUCT_WATER_CAR_1: Supports multi-piece structures and complex internal flow-channel designs.
ABOUT_DESC_1: Pipexpert Co., Ltd. specializes in high-power thermal-management technologies, offering solutions including:
ABOUT_DESC_2: R&D is based in Taiwan, focusing on front-end design, thermal simulation, and rapid prototyping. Our China manufacturing base delivers reliable mass-production capability, while our Vietnam partners support metal fabrication and machining. This structure enables speed, flexibility, and global supply readiness.
ABOUT_DESC_3: We collaborate deeply with customers throughout the product-development cycle—from thermal architecture design, prototyping, performance validation, to module integration and mass-production ramp-up—providing one-stop high-performance thermal solutions.
ABOUT_DESC_5: To develop future-oriented thermal technologies that support high-speed computing, optical communication, and advanced-process industries.
ABOUT_DESC_7: To become the most trusted technology partner in the global high-power thermal-management industry.
CONTACT_DESC: We are here to assist you and provide the support you need.
CONTACT_LOCATION_DESC: 5F, No.107, Wugong 2nd Rd., Wugu District, New Taipei City, Taiwan
CONTACT_LOCATION_DESC_1: Taiwan R&D Center: Design, thermal simulation, early-stage validation
CONTACT_LOCATION_DESC_2: China Manufacturing Base: VC, heat pipe, module mass production
CONTACT_LOCATION_DESC_3: Vietnam Metal-Manufacturing Partner: Structural parts and machining
